series_metadata.series_description: Ohio Department of Education website pages contain information made available to the public via the Internet as a matter of convenience. This records series may include, but are not limited to, general descriptive information about the State Board of Education Meetings, Administrators, Educators, Community, Agency Program groups, Frequently Asked Questions, Media News Center, bulletins, sample forms, weekly announcements, annual reports, rules of practice and procedure, etc. This Information is maintained electronically or in paper format by the record owners under separate retention schedules.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: on-line content information is obsolete, replaced, or superseded. content information is obsolete, replaced, and/or superseded; a document control log is maintained capture what information was made available public, when it was presented on-line and when it was removed
